micropython.source:
from microbit import *
maxSound = 0
lights = Image("11111:"
              "11111:"
              "11111:"
              "11111:"
              "11111")
# ignore first sound level reading
soundLevel = microphone.sound_level()
sleep(200)

while True:
    if button_a.is_pressed():
        display.scroll(maxSound)
    else:
        soundLevel = microphone.sound_level()
        display.show(lights * soundLevel)
        if soundLevel > maxSound:
            maxSound = soundLevel
